groups.label: Office Worker
groups.description: Direct walking and lunch-time commuting between building entrances and the central public space.

groups.label: Through Pedestrian
groups.description: Fast crossing behaviour with short duration and limited staying.

groups.label: Visitor
groups.description: Slower, irregular paths with searching, observing, and wayfinding behaviour.

groups.label: Passive User
groups.description: Sitting, waiting, or low-speed staying concentrated near edges and shaded seating.

groups.label: Student / Young User
groups.description: Flexible social use, group staying, and informal movement around active nodes.

groups.label: Service Staff
groups.description: Repeated functional routes between service points and building edges.
